regex-tester.title: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test and debug regular expressions in real-time.
regex-tester.article: Regular expressions (Regex) are sequences of characters that define a search pattern. They are used for string matching and manipulation. This tester provides real-time feedback, supporting common flags like global (g), case-insensitive (i), and multiline (m).

faqs.a0: This tool uses the standard JavaScript (ECMAScript) regular expression engine.
faqs.a1: Yes, use the 'Replace' tab to test regex replacements with capture group support (e.g., $1).

timestamp-converter.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human dates.
timestamp-converter.article: A Unix timestamp is a way to track time as a running total of seconds. This tool helps you convert these numbers into readable date formats (ISO, Local, UTC) and calculate relative time differences.

faqs.a0: Yes, the tool automatically detects if the timestamp is in seconds or milliseconds and converts accordingly.
faqs.a1: Local time is calculated using your browser's current timezone settings.

api-tester.title: API Tester
api-tester.description: Test REST APIs with custom headers and bodies.
api-tester.responsePlaceholder: Send a request to see the response here
api-tester.article: An API (Application Programming Interface) tester allows developers to send HTTP requests to test RESTful APIs. You can customize headers, query parameters, and the request body to simulate complex API interactions.

faqs.a0: Yes, as long as your local API has CORS enabled to accept requests from this application.
faqs.a1: No, all request history and data are ephemeral and cleared when you refresh the page.

curl-generator.title: Curl Generator
curl-generator.description: Convert UI requests into executable Curl commands.
curl-generator.article: cURL is a command-line tool used to transfer data over various network protocols. This generator provides a user-friendly interface to construct complex cURL commands with headers, bodies, and methods.

faqs.q0: Can I generate multi-line cURL commands?
faqs.a0: Yes, toggle the 'Multiline Output' setting to format the command with backslashes for easier reading.
faqs.a1: Yes, header values and JSON bodies are properly escaped to prevent shell injection and syntax errors.

uuid-generator.title: UUID Generator
uuid-generator.v4Desc: UUID v4 is the most commonly used version for random unique identifiers.
uuid-generator.article: A UUID (Universally Unique Identifier) is a 128-bit number used to identify information in computer systems. This tool generates UUID Version 4, which is based on random (or pseudo-random) numbers.

faqs.q0: Are the generated UUIDs truly unique?
faqs.a0: They use the browser's crypto API to generate highly secure, random UUIDs, making collisions practically impossible.
faqs.q1: Can I generate UUIDs in bulk?
faqs.a1: Yes, use the quantity slider to generate up to 20 UUIDs at once and copy them all with a single click.

unix-time-now.title: Unix Time Now
unix-time-now.description: Get the current Unix timestamp and copy it instantly.

faqs.a0: It updates every second to show the live current Unix time.

unix-time-now.article: A live Unix Epoch time counter displaying the number of seconds elapsed since January 1, 1970. Provides instant copyable values in UTC, local time, and decimal millisecond counts.

cron-expression-builder.title: Cron Expression Builder
cron-expression-builder.description: Visually build cron expressions and see the next scheduled runs.

faqs.a0: A cron expression is a string representing a schedule for running a task at specified times.

cron-expression-builder.article: A Cron Expression Builder allows you to visually build schedules for automated tasks, system scripts, and repetitive jobs. It validates your schedule syntax in real-time, helping prevent misconfigured intervals.

random-number-generator.title: Random Number Generator
random-number-generator.description: Generate random numbers within a specified range.

faqs.a0: Yes, you can enable the 'no-repeat' option to generate a sequence of unique random numbers.

random-number-generator.article: A Random Number Generator (RNG) creates unpredictable numerical values within a specified range. It is widely used in gaming, statistical sampling, cryptography, and randomized testing.
